data.name: ConfirmationCodeSent
data.value: If the account exists, a confirmation code has been sent.

data.name: UnableToResendConfirmationCode
data.value: Unable to resend confirmation code. Please try again later.

data.name: AccountConfirmedSuccessfully
data.value: Account confirmed successfully. You can now sign in.

data.name: AccountConfirmationFailed
data.value: Account confirmation failed. Please try again.

data.name: PasswordResetCodeSent
data.value: If the account exists, a password reset code has been sent to the email

data.name: PasswordResetSuccessfully
data.value: Password reset successfully

data.name: PasswordChangedSuccessfully
data.value: Password changed successfully

data.name: SignedOutSuccessfully
data.value: Signed out successfully

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid token

data.name: UnableToUpdateProfile
data.value: Unable to update profile

data.name: EmailVerificationSent
data.value: If the account exists, an email verification has been (re)sent.

data.name: UnableToResendVerificationEmail
data.value: Unable to resend verification email. Please try again later.

data.name: EmailConfirmedAndUpdated
data.value: Email confirmed and updated.

data.name: UnableToConfirmEmail
data.value: Unable to confirm email. Please try again.

data.name: MfaDisabledSuccessfully
data.value: MFA disabled successfully

data.name: MfaDisabledCanSignIn
data.value: MFA disabled successfully. You can now sign in without MFA.

data.name: UnableToDisableMfa
data.value: Unable to disable MFA. Please try again.

data.name: RedirectUriRequired
data.value: redirectUri is required

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category not found

data.name: CategoryCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create category. Please try again.

data.name: CategoryUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update category. Please try again.

data.name: CategoryDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete category. Please try again.

data.name: TransactionNotFound
data.value: Transaction not found

data.name: TransactionCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create transaction. Please try again.

data.name: TransactionUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update transaction. Please try again.

data.name: TransactionDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete transaction. Please try again.

data.name: AggregationNotFound
data.value: No aggregation data found

data.name: UserNotAuthenticated
data.value: User not authenticated.

data.name: ProfileNotFound
data.value: Profile not found.

data.name: ProfileRetrieveFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve profile.

data.name: ProfileUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update profile.

data.name: InvalidCurrency
data.value: Invalid currency code. Supported: JPY, USD, EUR, GBP, SGD, THB, MMK

data.name: DailyLimitNegative
data.value: Daily limit cannot be negative.

data.name: RecurringPaymentNotFound
data.value: Recurring payment not found

data.name: RecurringPaymentCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create recurring payment. Please try again.

data.name: RecurringPaymentUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update recurring payment. Please try again.

data.name: RecurringPaymentDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete recurring payment. Please try again.

data.name: RecurringPaymentMarkPaidFailed
data.value: Failed to mark recurring payment as paid. Please try again.

data.name: StartAndEndDateRequired
data.value: startDate and endDate are required
